Auth.title: Manage Government Tenders and Proposals Efficiently and Easily
Auth.subtitle: A digital platform that helps companies track tenders and create technical and financial proposals efficiently and securely.
Auth.card1Desc: Track all available competitions and opportunities easily.
Auth.card2Desc: Create professional proposals powered by AI.
Auth.card3Desc: Monitor the status of requests and approvals in real-time.
Auth.card4Desc: Manage documents and regulatory requirements with ease.

verification.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now log in.
verification.errorDescription: We couldn't verify your email address.
verification.resendDialogDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a new verification link.
verification.checkEmailDescription: We've sent a verification link to {email}.
verification.checkEmailInstructions: Please click the link in the email to verify your account. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
verification.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.

magicLink.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your secure link.
magicLink.failedDescription: We couldn't verify your magic link.

MagicLink.checkInboxDescription: We've sent a magic link to your email address. Click the link to sign in instantly.
MagicLink.cardDescription: Enter your email to receive a passwordless login link

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive a password reset link
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent.

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.description: Enter your new password below to update your account
ResetPassword.successToast: Password reset successfully! You can now log in.
ResetPassword.invalidToken: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
ResetPassword.noToken: No reset token provided. Please request a new password reset link.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
